details: Legacy decomposition function and extracted legacy run report/manifests are consistent with old residual-decomposition recipe.
cdfFromPT branch is implemented and used when PT_matrix data are available.
cdfFallbackFromRow branch is implemented and used when PT branch is unavailable.
Backbone CDF construction is on native current axis and does not use x=(I-I_peak)/w.
Centering and width normalization are used for residual alignment and SVD only.
Scripts tables reports and figures for attempted corrected-old outputs were inspected and classified.
No fully clean authoritative corrected-old artifact package was found among attempted outputs.
Attempted outputs include PT/CDF diagnostic backbone use and ad hoc decomposition in corrected-old named flows.
Quarantine/misleading classification applied to contaminated corrected-old named outputs.
S_model_pt_percent switching_canonical_phi1 and canonical kappa1 are used in attempted corrected-old visualization/review flows.
run_sw_corr_old_replay_auth and run_sw_corr_old_nonfinite_debug implement fallback-only replay behavior.
Verification shows contamination and incomplete/failed attempts so authoritative build is not yet safe without controlled recipe-locked runner.
Visible artifacts in figures/switching/canonical were reviewed with per-file provenance and naming-risk classification.
All visible switching_corrected_old_*.png were reviewed and no switching_corrected_old_*.fig were found.
Corrected-old named figures are treated as manuscript_safe=NO and QUARANTINED_MISLEADING unless authoritative corrected-old provenance is proven.

column5: and primary-collapse families were reviewed separately and not auto-quarantined.
